name: tradingview-mcp
description: MCP bridge for TradingView Desktop via Chrome DevTools Protocol

scripts.tv:launch: node -e "import { launch, healthCheck } from './src/core/health.js'; const b=process.env.TV_CDP_BROWSER||'auto'; const r=await launch({browser:b==='desktop'?'desktop':'chrome'}); console.log(JSON.stringify(r,null,2)); if(r.cdp_ready!==false){const h=await healthCheck();console.log('Chart:',h.chart_symbol,'@',h.chart_resolution);}"
scripts.egx:barrier:label: node scripts/egx_triple_barrier.mjs label
scripts.test:ci: node --test tests/cli.test.js tests/scorer.test.js tests/egx_calendar.test.js tests/migrate.test.js tests/notify_freshness.test.js tests/notify_delivery_audit.test.js tests/notify_pipeline.test.js tests/ops_digest.test.js tests/cron_log_check.test.js tests/automation_verify_ci.test.js tests/tv_bridge.test.js tests/recovery.test.js tests/data_quality_gate.test.js tests/proof_loop.test.js tests/learning_loop.test.js tests/loss_autopsy.test.js tests/safety_rules_extended.test.js tests/indicator_cache_gate.test.js tests/indicator_backfill.test.js tests/closed_loop.test.js tests/discovery_feedback.test.js tests/p6_research_context.test.js tests/directive_resolver.test.js tests/loop_audit.test.js tests/monitoring_snapshot.test.js
